request: Add a skill-ownership system: every SKILL.md declares owner: baseline|user, and a generated .claude/baseline.lock.json records baseline-owned slugs with content hashes. Lock is consumed by audit-baseline (drift detection) and a future upgrade subcommand (out of scope here). Scope: frontmatter convention, lock format/generator, audit integration, seed.md/CLAUDE.md amendments.
phase_6_route: solo /tdd (forced by new non-git rule landed in swarm-requires-git chore; stale swarm plan + approval invalidated)
